[Fact]
public async Task Create_WhenDataverseFileUploadFails_ShouldRetryAndThrowAfterExhaustion()
{
    // Arrange
    var dataverseRepoMock = new Mock<IDataverseRepository>();
    var loggerMock = new Mock<ILogger<DEDIANotificationServices>>();

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.CreateAsync(It.IsAny<Entity>(), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ReturnsAsync(Guid.NewGuid());

    dataverseRepoMock
        .Setup(repo => repo.UploadFileToColumnAsync(
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<Guid>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<Stream>(),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()))
        .ThrowsAsync(new Exception("Dataverse file upload failed"));

    var service = new DEDIANotificationServices(
        dataverseRepoMock.Object,
        loggerMock.Object);

    using var outputStream = new MemoryStream();
    using var writer = new StreamWriter(outputStream, leaveOpen: true);
    await writer.WriteAsync("test decrypted content");
    await writer.FlushAsync();
    outputStream.Position = 0;

    // Act
    var exception = await Assert.ThrowsAsync<InvalidOperationException>(() =>
        service.Create("test.txt", "txt", outputStream));

    // Assert
    Assert.Contains("D365 staging save failed after retry exhaustion", exception.Message);

    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.CreateAsync(It.IsAny<Entity>(), It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Exactly(3));

    dataverseRepoMock.Verify(
        repo => repo.UploadFileToColumnAsync(
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<Guid>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<string>(),
            It.IsAny<Stream>(),
            It.IsAny<CancellationToken>()),
        Times.Exactly(3));
}
